name: Sourdough Avocado Toast
tagline: Sourdough toasted dark, avocado smashed with lime, chili, flaky salt

hero.alt: Avocado toast with chili flakes and lime
hero.caption: avocado toast — café classic

steps.title: Toast dark
steps.detail: Toast sourdough until very dark — almost too dark. The crackle holds the avocado.
steps.tip: Pale toast collapses under the avocado. Dark = structural.

steps.title: Smash with lime
steps.detail: Halve avocado, scoop into a bowl. Squeeze lime over, season with salt, smash with a fork — chunky, not pureed.
steps.tip: Lime first stops oxidation and seasons evenly.

steps.title: Pile high
steps.detail: Pile avocado onto toast all the way to the edges. The point is generous.
steps.tip: Use the back of a spoon to make swoops — looks restaurant.

steps.title: Top and drizzle
steps.detail: Crack pepper, scatter chili flakes and flaky salt, drizzle olive oil from a height.
steps.tip: A pinch of furikake or za'atar makes it next-level.

healthFacts: Avocado is mostly monounsaturated fat — heart-protective.
Sourdough is lower-glycemic than regular bread thanks to lactic-acid fermentation.
